key.name: boot-boost-enabled
key.description: Enable boot boost on startup: schedutil for 30 seconds, then powersave.

key.name: boot-boost-duration
key.description: How many seconds boot boost should last before switching to powersave.

key.name: hide-power-profile-tile
key.description: Hide the default GNOME power mode tile from Quick Settings.

key.name: panel-position
key.description: Where to show CPU info on the top bar: left, center, or right.

key.name: panel-padding-left
key.description: Left padding for the CPU info indicator in pixels.

key.name: panel-padding-right
key.description: Right padding for the CPU info indicator in pixels.

key.name: show-panel-info
key.summary: Show CPU info on top bar
key.description: Show CPU temperature/frequency on the top panel.

key.name: panel-info-mode
key.description: What to show on the panel: temperature, frequency, or both.

key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often CPU info and governor state should refresh, in seconds.
